narrative:
Columbia I (precinct in Hamilton County) has 93 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.1%, a clear Democratic lean of 11.8 percentage points.
